title: Scispot Labsheet
description: A Scispot Labsheet is a structured LIMS data table used for sample registries, assay results, inventory tracking, and any structured lab data

description.description: Purpose and usage description of the labsheet

columns.description: Column definitions for the labsheet schema

rowCount.description: Total number of rows in the labsheet

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the labsheet was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification

LabsheetColumn.description: Definition of a single column in a Scispot labsheet

required.description: Whether a value is required for this column
